name: compliance trace: each consulted framework records controls_consulted[] (the specific control ids the rule provenance cited) per section 2.8 compliance_state.<framework>.controls_consulted
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/consumption-trace.sh" --commit-sha abc123 --consulted-compliance soc2-tsc --controls-consulted CC8.1,CC7.2 --emit "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc123.json" && grep "CC8.1" .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc123.json 1>&2 && grep "CC7.2" .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc123.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
